changelog:
- NEW: Hourly [HEALTH] log line — memory, GDI/USER handles, threads, Tk queues, task/mss counts. Makes slow leaks visible from a single run.
- NEW: Watchdog auto-restarts DLSBot.exe if no squads sent in 60 min — no more 15-hour dead runs
- Fix: batched log UI updates — one periodic drain instead of one after_idle per line (prevents Tk mainloop starvation over long runs)
- Fix: reject all-black screenshots — prevents recovery loops from spinning on invalid captures
- Fix: re-foreground window on 3 blank screenshots in a row
